SMILE INDEX: 63
WINDOW: 882.200s to 919.767s (smile at 902.200s to 904.767s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: in thunder and lightning. And the leader of the group which I was supposed to lead got killed. And many were hurt. I didn't go back to work. I went to the next train back to the mountains. And I helped in the rescues naturally. But even in the camps, I was always in care of the ambulance. I was a doctor in the camps. There were sick people.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
to work. I went to the next train back
